build.buildCommand: if [ -d Backend ]; then cd Backend; fi && composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader --no-interaction && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache

deploy.startCommand: if [ -d Backend ]; then cd Backend; fi && php artisan migrate --force && php -S 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8080} -t public/ public/index.php
